creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
openoffice.org-3.1.0 starts at the first time and creates his directory ~/.openoffice.org/ - after that first run, it crashes on every close. If I remove the directory ~/.openoffice.org/3/user and restart openoffice.org-3.1.0, then it closes normaly for one time - but after the next restart it crashes again on closing.

Here are 2 Screenshots: 

http://rotkap.gmxhome.de/ooo-crash1.png  and 

http://rotkap.gmxhome.de/ooo-crash2.png 

(sorry, my KDE is german).

My buildoptions for editors/openoffice.org-3: 

make LOCALIZED_LANG=de -DWITH_DEBUG -DWITH_KDE -DWITHOUT_MOZILLA -DWITHOUT_GNOME install clean

How-To-Repeat: start openoffice.org-3.1.0 and close it
